questions.question: Phototropism is primarily mediated by the redistribution of Auxin toward the ______ side of the plant organ.
Hormones like Auxin and Gibberellin often interact. For instance, Auxin is known to promote the synthesis of which other hormone in some tissues?
Arithmetic growth vs. Geometric growth: Which represents the pattern where only one daughter cell continues to divide while the other differentiates?

options.A: Arithmetic Growth (e.g., Root elongation at constant rate)

questions.question: The 'Triple Response' of ethylene includes which of the following?

options.A: All of the above (swelling, horizontal growth, apical hook)
